title: Blitzeers pack
description: One of the best PvP packs that includes many different features, not just for PvP but also for normal Minecraft gameplay.
body:
The pack consists of several individual items combined into one.

The pack includes
- No Bedrock
- Custom Crystals and more
- Clean Water/Glass
- Small Totem Pop
- beaver totem
- Clean font
- Custom Sounds 
- No Particle
and more
